title: Valle announces price and launch date of Steam Machine, exceeding $1,000
summary: The long-awaited Valle console/PC has a high cost due to supply problems, generating mixed reviews among the press and players.

title: EA conducts another round of layoffs as it prepares for its sale to Saudi Arabia
summary: The company is laying off staff in recruiting, support, security, and IT amid reports of a possible acquisition by the Saudi fund PIF.

title: CD Projekt talks about generative AI in games and its reputation after Cyberpunk 2077
summary: The CEO of CD Projekt Red comments on studios creating games with AI and acknowledges that its reputation has not recovered from the disastrous launch of Cyberpunk 2077.

title: Microsoft announces the live-action film of Sea of Thieves
summary: Microsoft confirms the film adaptation of the popular pirate game, joining a dozen Xbox series and movie projects in development.

title: New details and rumors about GTA 6 capture the attention of followers
summary: Fans speculate about leaked prices, the mysterious reflections of a Ferris wheel, and the game's possible inspiration from Marvel's new Wolverine.

title: Hideo Kojima shows new images of OD, his upcoming horror game that resembles P.T.
summary: New screenshots and statements from Kojima reveal a psychological horror game with Hunter Schafer, evoking the atmosphere of his canceled demo P.T.

title: Fan projects of Zelda: Ocarina of Time are canceled after years of development
summary: Several unofficial Ocarina of Time remakes in Unreal Engine cease development following Nintendo's official announcement or the withdrawal of their own creators.

title: The premiere of House of the Dragon season 3 generates great controversy among fans
summary: A specific dialogue in the first episode of the new season has caused divided opinions and intense debate on social media.

title: Aardman's stop-motion animated Pokémon series reveals its first image and region
summary: The Wallace and Gromit studio confirms that the series will be set in an especially appropriate region and will arrive next year.

title: Meccha Chameleon becomes the new indie phenomenon with astronomical sales
summary: The artistic hide-and-seek game has sold a record amount in just two weeks, unleashing a frenzy for its custom maps and original premise.

title: Critical Role's Campaign 4 shocks with the death of its first player character
summary: The new 13-player campaign of Critical Role reaches a high point with a shocking death that has completely captivated the audience.

title: Warframe developers lament the 'end' of Destiny 2 and the weakening of the genre
summary: The creators of Warframe express their sadness over the death of Destiny 2, calling it an earthquake in the industry that affects games as a service.

title: The free 'Starter Demo' of Rhythm Heaven Groove is now available on Nintendo Switch
summary: Nintendo releases a playable demo of the long-awaited return of the rhythm franchise, allowing you to try several minigames before its final release.

title: A mod revives the multiplayer of The Last of Us 2 on PC, exciting the community
summary: While the official multiplayer project of The Last of Us was canceled, a modder is making the community enjoy the competitive mode on PC.

title: ArenaNet announces a second Guild Wars game in the month and reviews the franchise's legacy
summary: The studio surprises with another announcement within the Guild Wars saga while developers reflect on their attempt to escape the MMO label in 2005.

title: The mech builder SAND arrives in early access after multiple launch delays
summary: After several postponements in 2025, the mech building and combat game SAND: Raiders of Sophie is finally released on PC, receiving multiple guides and analyses.

title: Capcom announces a new Spotlight event for June 25 with a teaser trailer
summary: Capcom confirms the holding of a digital event this week to show news of its upcoming releases, generating excitement among fans.

title: Controversy over the ring design of the Halo remake and details of Evolved's cooperative
summary: While the Halo remake is criticized on social media for the design of its iconic ring, it is confirmed that Halo: Campaign Evolved will not require PS Plus for local cooperative mode.

title: Ubisoft co-founder dies in a tragic plane accident
summary: The executive, a key figure in the history of the French video game company, lost his life in a tragic airplane accident.

title: Todd Howard speaks out about The Elder Scrolls 6: 'We need to do it right'
summary: The director of Bethesda breaks his silence on the development of the next installment of the saga, stating that the pressure to meet fan expectations is at its highest.
